name: priceradar
description: PriceRadar — Indian e-commerce price comparison platform

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "SERVER,CLIENT" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev:mem --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.dev:atlas: concurrently --names "SERVER,CLIENT" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
